ideation: This sequence mimics picking and presenting a strawberry. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed. Frame 2 shows the right arm reaching down and slightly forward to pick the strawberry. Frame 3 shows the right arm lifting the strawberry upward. Frame 4 shows the right arm extending forward to present the strawberry. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to a relaxed position. The left arm remains largely still, for balance and to focus attention on the right arm.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm reaches down to grasp a hidden berry
the right arm lifts the prize triumphantly upward
presenting the ripe strawberry forward with care
both arms return to a relaxed, resting state
